commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an explicit pending-kind guard in `src/channels/message/ingress-queue.test.ts` before asserting the duplicate record payload.

PR surface: Tests +3. Total +3 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main reads `pending.record.payload` after only a Vitest expectation, while the enqueue result is a union with variants whose records do not have `payload`. I did not run tsgo because this review was required to keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed; the patch is already narrow and I found no actionable defect for automation to fix.

target.title: test(channels): narrow ingress queue pending duplicate
target.body:
Summary:
- Narrow the ingress queue duplicate result before reading `record.payload` in the test.
- Fixes the current `tsconfig.core.test` type error introduced by the SQLite-backed ingress queue test shape.

Verification:
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/channels/message/ingress-queue.test.ts`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/channels/message/ingress-queue.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/channels/message/ingress-queue.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- Crabbox AWS changed gate: provider=aws lease=cbx_7dac306becb0 slug=violet-crab run=run_762803ecc131 exit=0 lanes=coreTests

Behavior addressed: current main `pnpm check:changed` can fail in core-test typecheck because the test reads `pending.record.payload` before TypeScript has narrowed the enqueue result to the `pending` variant.
Real environment tested: AWS Crabbox Linux runner, c7a.8xlarge, current origin/main 90712f6d5e64bff99c192f87faae08d3fef7bfc5 plus this branch diff.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --target linux --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 180m --timing-json --shell -- env OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 corepack pnpm check:changed`
Evidence after fix: Crabbox run `run_762803ecc131`, lease `cbx_7dac306becb0`, slug `violet-crab`, exit 0.
Observed result after fix: changed gate selected `coreTests`; conflict marker, attribution, duplicate coverage, dependency/patch guards, core-test typecheck, and changed-file lint passed.
What was not tested: full repository test suite.
target.author: vincentkoc
